# name

Organizes functions for consistent column naming for `tibble`s and
`data.frame`s.

## Installation

You can install the released version of name from
[CRAN](https://CRAN.R-project.org) with:

``` r
install.packages('name')
```

You can install the current version of `name` from GitHub.

``` r
pak::pak('christopherkenny/name')
```

## Example

``` r
library(name)
library(dplyr)
#> 
#> Attaching package: 'dplyr'
#> The following objects are masked from 'package:stats':
#> 
#>     filter, lag
#> The following objects are masked from 'package:base':
#> 
#>     intersect, setdiff, setequal, union
data(mtcars)
```

We can add a prefix:

``` r
mtcars <- mtcars %>% 
  rename_with(\(x) add_pref(x, 'pref_'))
```

And similarly a suffix:

``` r
mtcars <- mtcars %>% 
  rename_with(\(x) add_suff(x, '_suff'))
```

Or a replace a phrase:

``` r
mtcars <- mtcars %>% 
  rename_with(\(x) repl_phrase(x, '_hp', '_hitpoints'))
```

# Package index

## Clean

Functions for cleaning names

- [`clean_names()`](http://www.christophertkenny.com/name/reference/clean_names.md)
  : Clean data frame column names
- [`str_clean_names()`](http://www.christophertkenny.com/name/reference/str_clean_names.md)
  : Clean a character vector of names

## Relocate

Function to relocate with a function

- [`relocate_with()`](http://www.christophertkenny.com/name/reference/relocate_with.md)
  : Relocate columns

## Prefix

Functions for adjusting name prefixes

- [`add_pref()`](http://www.christophertkenny.com/name/reference/add_pref.md)
  : Add Prefix
- [`rem_pref()`](http://www.christophertkenny.com/name/reference/rem_pref.md)
  : Remove Prefix
- [`repl_pref()`](http://www.christophertkenny.com/name/reference/repl_pref.md)
  : Replace Prefix

## Suffix

Functions for adjusting name suffixes

- [`add_suff()`](http://www.christophertkenny.com/name/reference/add_suff.md)
  : Add Suffix
- [`rem_suff()`](http://www.christophertkenny.com/name/reference/rem_suff.md)
  : Remove Suffix
- [`repl_suff()`](http://www.christophertkenny.com/name/reference/repl_suff.md)
  : Replace Suffix

## Phrases

Functions for adjusting name phrases

- [`rem_phrase()`](http://www.christophertkenny.com/name/reference/rem_phrase.md)
  : Remove Phrase
- [`repl_phrase()`](http://www.christophertkenny.com/name/reference/repl_phrase.md)
  : Replace Phrase

## Compare

Functions for comparing names

- [`compare_names()`](http://www.christophertkenny.com/name/reference/compare_names.md)
  : Compare the Names of Two Objects
- [`rename_with_loud()`](http://www.christophertkenny.com/name/reference/rename_with_loud.md)
  : Rename with, but Loudly

## Sorting

Functions for sorting names

- [`sort_phrase()`](http://www.christophertkenny.com/name/reference/sort_phrase.md)
  : Sort by Phrase
- [`sort_pref()`](http://www.christophertkenny.com/name/reference/sort_pref.md)
  : Sort by Prefix
- [`sort_suff()`](http://www.christophertkenny.com/name/reference/sort_suff.md)
  : Sort by Suffix

## Listing

Functions for listing components names

- [`list_phrase()`](http://www.christophertkenny.com/name/reference/list_phrase.md)
  : List Phrases
- [`list_pref()`](http://www.christophertkenny.com/name/reference/list_pref.md)
  : List Prefixes
- [`list_suff()`](http://www.christophertkenny.com/name/reference/list_suff.md)
  : List Suffixes

## Data

Example data

- [`sd`](http://www.christophertkenny.com/name/reference/sd.md) : South
  Dakota Election and Demographic Data
